personal.preferred_title: Data Engineer | AWS, Python, PySpark & Governed Data Pipelines

summary: Data Engineer with deep experience building and operationalizing Python, SQL, PySpark, and AWS-based data pipelines for enterprise analytics, reporting, forecasting, and data-driven decision-making. Strong background transforming large-scale operational telemetry into trusted datasets, applying data quality controls, governance practices, and data warehousing patterns in regulated financial environments. Experienced collaborating with business, infrastructure, and analytics stakeholders to deliver reliable data products that support BI, AI, and ML use cases.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and operationalized Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, transforming raw operational data into analytics-ready datasets for reporting and decision support.
Developed AWS-based data workflows using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Athena querying, and Redshift-backed analytics/forecasting workloads.
Applied data quality, validation, cleansing, and reconciliation practices to improve reliability, completeness, and trust in enterprise reporting pipelines.
Designed data models and Oracle schemas for historical retention, trend analysis, capacity forecasting, and executive reporting in a regulated banking environment.
Built PySpark-enabled forecasting and reporting workflows using large-scale telemetry datasets to support BI, analytics, and ML-enabled infrastructure planning.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Data-mined real-user performance and synthetic monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for critical hospitality systems, supporting performance visibility, operational reporting, and stakeholder decision-making.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning by assessing monitoring readiness, data collection needs, and platform performance requirements.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Managed enterprise CA APM environments supporting 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents and large-scale operational data collection.
Built Perl/Ksh automation scripts for recurring data extraction and performance reporting, replacing manual export processes.
Created dashboards, alerts, and reporting modules used by application and infrastructure teams to analyze system behavior and reliability.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting, Java, C++
skills.Cloud & Data: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, AWS EC2, PySpark, Apache Spark, Hive/Hadoop, Data Warehousing, ETL Design & Optimization
skills.Data Management: Data Quality, Data Governance, Data Security, Data Cleansing, Data Modeling, Data Validation, Analytics-Ready Data Products
skills.AI/ML Enablement: ML Forecasting Pipelines, Prophet, scikit-learn, BI/ML-Supporting Data Pipelines, Telemetry Analysis
skills.Tools & Infra: Airflow, Docker, Git, Streamlit, Linux/Unix, BMC TrueSight / TSCO, Dynatrace, CA APM / Introscope, AppDynamics
skills.Learning / Exposure: Databricks, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, Snowflake, dbt

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built Python and PySpark data pipelines that prepared large-scale telemetry datasets for forecasting, reporting, and operational analytics. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90% and surfaced insights through Streamlit dashboards for infrastructure decision-making.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed AWS-based lakehouse patterns using S3, Glue, Athena, PySpark, Parquet, and Snappy to support scalable ETL processing, analytics-ready datasets, and optimized query access.
